message:
test(fleet): gate e2e tests behind true-e2e feature

Fleet E2E tests require pre-built binaries (rch, rchd, rch-wkr) that
are only available in the dedicated e2e CI job which runs `cargo build
--release` first. Regular `cargo test` only compiles test binaries.

- Add `#![cfg(feature = "true-e2e")]` to skip in regular test runs
- Tests now only run in e2e CI job with --features true-e2e
- Fixes test failures: "Could not find rch-wkr binary"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
